title: X-hair Crosshair!
description: Shis crosshair resembles an X and adds a lot to the game! Fantastic for bringing in bedwars!
body:
This is one of my favorit crosshairs so far! It is increable for bedwars bridging and takes no time to get used to. I love this crosshair and i have started playing with it and cant go back!

This simple crosshair adds a lot to the game and makes gameplay so much better and i love how it looks when bridging! it makes a great brigdin crosshair sense it lines up so nicely with the blocks edges!

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
